fn has_invalid_entry(entries: &[Entry]) -> bool {
    let names: Vec<&str> = entries.iter().map(|e| e.name.as_str()).collect();
    names.iter().any(|n| n.is_empty())
}

fn count_matching(items: &[Item], threshold: f64) -> usize {
    let filtered: Vec<&Item> = items.iter().filter(|i| i.score > threshold).collect();
    filtered.len()
}

fn find_first_error(results: &[Result<(), String>]) -> Option<String> {
    let errors: Vec<&str> = results
        .iter()
        .filter_map(|r| r.as_ref().err().map(|e| e.as_str()))
        .collect();
    errors.first().map(|s| s.to_string())
}

struct Entry { name: String }
struct Item { score: f64 }
